short_summary: Iran deal may ease energy costs
rationale: For a Portuguese resident, the main relevant development is the potential Iran peace deal and Hormuz reopening, which could lower energy prices; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach, Hormuz reopening possible
top_events.summary: A potential Hormuz reopening and UAE fund release could reduce global oil prices, offering modest relief to Portuguese households facing energy and cost-of-living pressures.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Concrete financial steps toward an Iran deal add credibility to energy market stabilization prospects, with a small positive indirect effect on Portuguese energy bills.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT use
top_events.summary: A US lawsuit against OpenAI over AI safety raises broader questions about AI regulation in the EU, with limited but emerging relevance for Portuguese digital consumers.
